label: OpenRouter Config
description: OpenRouter model and parameters. When multiple OpenRouterInference nodes share the same settings, point them at one OpenRouterConfig node to keep maintenance simple. Only use multiple configs when you truly need different settings.

inputs.name: systemPrompt
inputs.label: System Prompt
inputs.description: System prompt for every inference node wired to this config. This is the one place to set it.

inputs.name: reasoning
inputs.label: Enable Reasoning
inputs.description: Enable extended thinking for supported models

inputs.name: reasoningEffort
inputs.label: Reasoning Effort
inputs.description: Only used when reasoning is enabled

inputs.name: provider
inputs.label: Provider
inputs.description: Serve the model from one specific OpenRouter provider (anthropic, fireworks, amazon-bedrock, ...). Leave empty to let OpenRouter route. Providers charge different rates for the same model, so pinning one also pins the price.

inputs.name: providerFallbacks
inputs.label: Allow provider fallbacks
inputs.description: When a provider is pinned, still fall back to others if it is unavailable. On by default. Turning it off makes the call fail rather than be served (and billed) by someone else.

outputs.name: config
outputs.description: OpenRouter configuration object fed into one or more OpenRouterInference nodes.
